qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: repo import lets low-privilege users clone private on-host repositories through file:// remotes
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: It identifies the same Soft Serve SSH `repo import` flow and the same root cause as the advisory: destination-side authorization is checked for a new repo, but the attacker-controlled source `REMOTE` reaches `pkg/backend/repo.go` and `git.Clone` without validating or authorizing a server-local repository path.

selected_finding.title: repo import lets low-privilege users clone private on-host repositories through file:// remotes

target_advisory_judgement.reason: The `repo_import_local_repo_read` finding matches the advisory's missing source-remote validation/authorization in Soft Serve's SSH `repo import` path, and the copied PoC achieved the advisory impact by importing a private on-host repository the attacker could not read directly into a repository they controlled.
evidence: The advisory and fix commit `c147421caf234bcfc1570c79d728ecbbe5813e55` center on adding source-remote validation before `git.Clone`; the selected finding names the same `pkg/ssh/cmd/import.go` -> `pkg/backend/repo.go` flow and the same `file://` local-repository source condition.

`pkg/backend/user.go` grants authenticated users `ReadWriteAccess` when the destination repository does not yet exist, matching the advisory's prerequisite that any authenticated SSH user can create a new destination repo and reach `repo import`.

`/Users/lumi/ziyue/EvoHunt-Run/advisory_f6a0a693/.judge/poc_runs/repo_import_local_repo_read/run.log` shows the copied PoC first reaching the control case `confirming the attacker cannot read the private repo directly` and then invoking `importing the private repo through a local file:// path`.

The same log records `imported repo content: secret-from-victim` and `verification signal: EVOHUNT_IMPORT_LOCAL_REPO_READ_CONFIRMED`, which proves unauthorized disclosure of private repository content through the advisory-described vulnerable import flow.

poc_executions.observed_effect: The copied PoC cloned the vulnerable target commit, but Docker image build failed with `no space left on device` before the target service started or the advisory path was exercised.

The adapted copied PoC built the vulnerable Soft Serve commit on the host, created a private victim repo, confirmed direct attacker reads failed, then imported the victim's server-local repository path into an attacker-owned repo and read `secret-from-victim` from the imported copy. The script returned exit code 1 only afterward because temp-directory cleanup hit read-only Go module files.
